Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Excise Act and the Excise Act, 2001 (adjusted duties â beer, malt liquor, spirits and wine)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Excise Act and the Excise Act, 2001 (adjusted duties â beer, malt liquor, spirits and wine)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Excise Act and the Excise Act, 2001, to repeal or amend sections of those Acts that provide for annual adjustments to the duties imposed on beer, malt liquor, spirits and wine.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Section 170.2 of the Excise Act is repealed.
The Schedule to the Act is amended by replacing the references after the heading âSCHEDULEâ with the following:
Parts II and II.1 of the Schedule to the Act are replaced by the following:
On all beer or malt liquor containing more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $31.22 per hectolitre.
On all beer or malt liquor containing more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume but not more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $15.61 per hectolitre.
On all beer or malt liquor containing not more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $2.591 per hectolitre.
On the first 2,000 hectolitres of beer and malt liquor brewed in Canada,

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $3.122 per hectolitre;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume but not more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $1.561 per hectolitre; and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains not more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $0.2591 per hectolitre.

Section.Text: On the next 3,000 hectolitres of beer and malt liquor brewed in Canada,

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $6.244 per hectolitre;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume but not more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $3.122 per hectolitre; and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains not more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $0.5182 per hectolitre.

Section.Text: On the next 10,000 hectolitres of beer and malt liquor brewed in Canada,

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $12.488 per hectolitre;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume but not more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $6.244 per hectolitre; and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains not more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $1.0364 per hectolitre.

Section.Text: On the next 35,000 hectolitres of beer and malt liquor brewed in Canada,

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $21.854 per hectolitre;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume but not more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $10.927 per hectolitre; and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains not more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $1.8137 per hectolitre.

Section.Text: On the next 25,000 hectolitres of beer and malt liquor brewed in Canada,

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $26.537 per hectolitre;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume but not more than 2.5% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $13.269 per hectolitre; and

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: if it contains not more than 1.2% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $2.2024 per hectolitre.

Section.Text: Section 123.1 of the Excise Act, 2001 is repealed.
Section 135.1 of the Act is repealed.

Subsection.Text: Subparagraphs 217(2)(a)(i) and (ii) of the Act are replaced by the following:

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: $11.696 multiplied by the number of litres of absolute ethyl alcohol in the spirits to which the offence relates,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: $0.62 multiplied by the number of litres of wine to which the offence relates, and

Subsection.Text: Subparagraphs 217(3)(a)(i) and (ii) of the Act are replaced by the following:

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: $23.392 multiplied by the number of litres of absolute ethyl alcohol in the spirits to which the offence relates,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: $1.24 multiplied by the number of litres of wine to which the offence relates, and

Subsection.Text: Subparagraphs 218(2)(a)(i) and (ii) of the Act are replaced by the following:

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: $23.392 multiplied by the number of litres of absolute ethyl alcohol in the spirits to which the offence relates, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: $1.24 multiplied by the number of litres of wine to which the offence relates, and

Subsection.Text: Subparagraphs 218(3)(a)(i) and (ii) of the Act are replaced by the following:

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: $35.088 multiplied by the number of litres of absolute ethyl alcohol in the spirits to which the offence relates, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: $1.86 multiplied by the number of litres of wine to which the offence relates, and

Section.Text: Section 242 of the Act is replaced by the following:
Every person who contravenes section 72 is liable to a penalty equal to $1.24 per litre of wine to which the contravention relates.

Subsection.Text: Paragraph 243(1)(b) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if the contravention relates to wine, $1.24 per litre of that wine.

Subsection.Text: Paragraph 243(2)(b) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if the contravention relates to wine, $0.62 per litre of that wine.

Section.Text: Paragraph 243.1(b) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if the contravention relates to wine, $0.62 per litre of that wine.

Section.Text: Schedule 4 to the Act is replaced by the following:
Spirits: $11.696 per litre of absolute ethyl alcohol contained in the spirits.
Spirits containing not more than 7% absolute ethyl alcohol by volume: $0.295 per litre of spirits.
Schedule 6 to the Act is replaced by the following:

Provision.Text: (a) in the case of wine that contains not more than 1.2% of absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $0.0205 per litre;
(b) in the case of wine that contains more than 1.2% of absolute ethyl alcohol by volume but not more than 7% of absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $0.295 per litre; and
(c) in the case of wine that contains more than 7% of absolute ethyl alcohol by volume, $0.62 per litre.

Section.Text: Sections 1 to 12 apply to the 2022 and subsequent taxation years.
